title: EQ - Custom EQ, all possible values
scenario: Custom EQ allows setting all slider values and saving the preset configuration in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device that supports EQ is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to enter Device Settings.
5. Adjust each EQ slider (e.g., 32Hz, 64Hz, 125Hz, 250Hz, 500Hz, 1kHz, 2kHz, 4kHz, 8kHz, 16kHz) to various positions, including minimum, maximum, and mid-range values.
6. Tap the Save or Apply button to save the custom EQ preset.
7. Exit the EQ screen and re-enter it to verify the saved configuration persists.
expected: It is possible to set all EQ slider values to any combination (minimum, maximum, and intermediate positions) and successfully save the custom EQ preset. The saved configuration persists after leaving and re-entering the EQ screen.
